case_title: JUDY CASCO VS. BARNES NAMAN BETANCOURT et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BETANCOURT, BARNES NAMAN
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CASCO, JUDY AS TO DEFENDANT BETANCOURT, BARNES NAMAN
